response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: LaLigaSoccerTeam(realMadrid)
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: (exists x LaLigaSoccerTeam(x))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: (LaLigaSoccerTeam(realMadrid) & LaLigaSoccerTeam(barcelona) & LaLigaSoccerTeam(atleticoMadrid))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: (LaLigaSoccerTeam(realMadrid) | -LaLigaSoccerTeam(barcelona))
